summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Practice Management Clients tab table/card toggle, Calendar tab with stats and CRUD, and Tasks tab with stats and action menus. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All features implemented correctly and working as expected

details: Table view is default on desktop
Toggle buttons present with data-testid='clients-view-table-btn' and 'clients-view-card-btn'
LayoutList icon for table view, Grid3X3 icon for card view
Table columns: Client, Type, Email, Phone, Company, Actions
Card view shows client cards in 3-column grid
Toggle switches view correctly
MoreVertical (3 dots) action button in Actions column
Dropdown shows: Edit, Delete
Delete option highlighted in red
Stats row shows: Total Events (106), Upcoming (10), Deadlines (27), Court Hearings (18)
Overdue badge visible ('5 overdue')
Add Event button with data-testid='add-event-btn'
Event Title input
Event Type dropdown (Meeting, Court Hearing, Deadline, Reminder, Appointment)
Start Date/Time and End Date/Time inputs
Location input
Link to Client (optional) dropdown with client list
Link to Case (optional) dropdown with case list
Description textarea
MoreVertical action menu on each event card
Dropdown shows: Edit, Delete (red)
Stats row shows: Total Tasks (141), Completed (17), Overdue (12-13), Urgent (37-38)
Filter buttons: All, pending, in progress, completed
Add Task button with data-testid='add-task-btn'
Overdue alert banner visible with red background
Shows '12 Overdue Tasks - Please review and complete these tasks'
Warning icon with alert message
Task Title input
Due Date input
Priority dropdown (Low, Medium, High, Urgent)
Status dropdown (Pending, In Progress, Completed)
Link to Client (optional) dropdown
Link to Case (optional) dropdown
Description textarea
MoreVertical action menu on each task
Dropdown shows 5 options: Edit, Set Pending, Set In Progress, Mark Complete, Delete
Delete option highlighted in red
Status icons: Clock (amber) for Pending, Target (blue) for In Progress, CheckSquare (green) for Complete

seed_data_creation: Existing seed data used (113 clients, 85 cases, 141 tasks, 106 events)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Practice Management tab features verified working: Clients tab with table/card toggle and action menu, Calendar tab with stats row and event CRUD with client/case linking, Tasks tab with stats row, overdue alert banner, and action menus for status changes. KwikPay payment integration is MOCKED.
